events.reasoning: Proceed through GAME_OVER

RUN 226 END — DEFEAT at Floor 16 (The Guardian, boss left at 56/240). Watcher A0. Cleared all of Act 1 incl 3 elites (Nob, Sentries, Lagavulin) + Mushrooms. Died to Fierce Bash 32 at 4 HP after a long grind. Root cause: entered the boss at 67% (55/82) and the Guardian's sustained 32/20 attacks ground me down faster than my single-Wrath-entry (Eruption+) engine could trigger Mode Shifts. Key lesson: needed a 2nd Wrath entry (Crescendo) for burst consistency, and more block density / a healing source. GG.

events.text: RECALL -- Gremlin Nob, layer:heuristics, enemies/Gremlin Nob

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY — Gremlin Nob (84 HP, Metallicize 4). TYPE: Elite, kill speed. WIN CON: attacks only after his Bellow; ~20 dmg/turn = 4-turn kill. ZERO DMG PLAN: none — race him, eat Rushes (16 at A5). KEY CARDS: Bash+ (Vuln 3), Twin Strike, Strikes; consider ONE Spot Weakness on an attack-intent turn (+3 Str for me vs +2 Enrage for him — math favors us, deviating slightly from zero-skill rule). POTION: Explosive Potion mid-fight to shave a turn. RISKS: back-to-back 16s; Metallicize eats 4/turn. WIN%: 62%. WHY: full HP, decent attack density (8 attacks vs 6 skills).

To the Champ

FIGHT — The Champ (420 HP). PHASE PLAN: P1 build Str (SW on his attack turns, Inflame, Metallicize early), block Heavy Slash 19s, park him ~220-240. Debuffs get purged at 50% Anger — save Shockwave+ for P2. MEGA-TURN at transition: Duplication Potion + Heavy Blade+ x2 (at Str 10+ that's 120+) to blow through 210 and deep into P2 before Execute cadence starts. WIN%: 70%. WHY: 79% HP entry, strong burst tools, but 420 HP is a long fight and P2 hits 22+.

ACT 2 CLEAR — Champ killed with an EXACT 72 lethal (12+36+12+12 vs 10 block + 62 HP) while at 3 HP. Survived because the T13 'set up Vuln and pray' line was correctly chosen over pure blocking (which died to T15 Execute regardless). WIN%: 65% (-5 then +recover). WHY: won the boss but burned all 3 potions and hit 3 HP — P2 Anger (+6 Str, debuff purge) was undercounted in my pacing; I should have entered P2 with MORE HP banked or burst deeper. MARGIN NOTE: Champ P2 math — Execute every 3rd turn at Str 13 = 46+; the transition mega-turn should target ending P1 with enough damage to skip one full Execute cycle. Worth encoding a 'P2 budget' rule: don't cross 50% unless you can kill within ~4 turns.

To Donu and Deca

FINAL BOSS — Donu and Deca (250+250, Artifact 2 each). WIN CON: focus Donu (stops +3 Str/turn), Whirlwind+ does double duty on both, SW+Inflame+Red Skull feed Heavy Blade+ (x5) and Bludgeon finishers. Deca's Beams add Dazed → Evolve turns them into draws, Charon's Ashes turns them into 3 AOE each. Potions: Dex for block density, Blood Potion at low HP, Skill Potion flex. Enter 83%. WIN%: 72%. WHY: deck is exactly built for this fight profile; risk is 26+/turn incoming over a long fight.

VICTORY — Ironclad A5, floor 50, 34/95 HP. Donu died to Bludgeon on his 9-HP turn; Deca fell to a Str-11 Heavy Blade+ (103) + Cleave on his Square turn. WIN%: 100%. The Strength-burst archetype (SW+Inflame+Red Skull → HB+/Bludgeon/Whirlwind+, Double Tap doubling) carried every major fight. Key engine: Bottled Offering + Philosopher's Stone + Busted Crown = 7E openers every combat.
